form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when third (29.81) over 515m at Sandown. Has a fair record off the rails draw and capable of a better result.

form.formComment: Far too good last start to post a big 9 lengths win at this track over 525m (29.98) beating Weblec Pepper in Grade 5 on April 1. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 3 lengths behind Holden Bale over 525m. Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: He hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Needs to do more. Others better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked turning into back straight, faltered and pulled up.

form.formComment: Bounced back last start after failing to finish two starts back when she finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 515m at Sandown behind Hoppy beaten 3.5 lengths (29.81). Others preferred on this occasion.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 1.3 lengths at Ballarat over 545m (31.07) beating Layla Nova in Grade 5 on April 1. Form reads well for this.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by half a length over 525m at this track (30.04). Can make it back to back wins.
